description: Agent-ready Vercel admin CLI for deployments, projects, domains, environment variables, teams, logs, and operator briefs.

novel_features.name: Recent deployment brief
novel_features.description: Summarize recent Vercel deployments by project, target, and state from the live deployments API.

novel_features.name: Deployment failure brief
novel_features.description: Join deployment metadata, events, check runs, and runtime logs into one incident-triage payload.
